title: Super Mario Galaxy 2: Flip-Out Galaxy/Wicked Wall Jumps in 01:39:20
description:
Just because KrazyBrawl sped run it. He is cool for making a playthrough of this game.

I messed up a heck lot, but still beat his time so meh, running into those bulbous flythings and ground spikes, whatnots. The key is spinning into a wall jump. Also utilizing long jumps, backflips, and sideflips.

But yeah, still picking out a Galaxy 2 song for Herme's soccer.
